headline: Cencora (COR) Launches Nucleus Pilot As Verizon Executive Joins As CHRO
summary: Cencora (NYSE:COR) has launched a multi-site pilot of its upgraded Nucleus inventory management solution for specialty physician practices. The pilot focuses on improving medication workflow efficiency and inventory visibility across participating sites. The company has appointed Samantha Hammock, formerly of Verizon, as Chief Human Resources Officer, succeeding Silvana Battaglia. These developments reflect operational and leadership changes that may affect Cencora's specialty care...

headline: Why Paying Off Your Mortgage Early May Be A Retirement Mistake
summary: The standard retirement script says pay off the mortgage before you retire. The logic is simple: eliminate the biggest monthly bill and retirement becomes easier to fund. But today’s interest-rate environment complicates the calculation. A homeowner with a 3% to 4% mortgage may be directing extra cash toward a loan that costs less than the ... Why Paying Off Your Mortgage Early May Be A Retirement Mistake

headline: Verizon (VZ) Faces A New Rival If Starlink Launches U.S. Mobile Service
summary: SpaceX is reportedly weighing a Starlink retail mobile internet service in the U.S., which would compete directly with Verizon Communications (NYSE:VZ), AT&T, and T-Mobile. Starlink has secured wireless spectrum licenses and may choose to operate its own retail offering rather than rely on existing carrier partnerships. This potential entry could matter most in rural and underserved areas, where Starlink's satellite network may appeal to customers with limited traditional coverage...
